title: JobSignal
description: A public job posting interpreted as a buying signal. Sources are public postings read manually or via feeds the company exposes — never scraping behind authentication or against terms. Any outreach from a signal is still a draft under founder approval.

role_posted.description: e.g. Sales Operations, CRM Manager, Growth Manager.

mapped_offer.description: Offer from the product catalog this signal maps to.

source.description: Public source label (no scraped or login-gated data).
